pi_items.metadata_value: R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing
pi_items.verified_value: R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing
pi_items.source: Official R citation format from https://www.r-project.org/ and multiple academic references
Official R Foundation website and academic citation references (scirp.org, ropensci.org)
Official R announcement at stat.ethz.ch pipermail, released April 21, 2023
Official R Foundation website at https://www.r-project.org/foundation/

Official R Foundation website confirms location: 'The R Foundation is seated in Vienna, Austria and currently hosted by the Vienna University of Economics and Business' (Wirtschaftsuniversität Wien, Welthandelsplatz 1, 1020 Vienna, Austria)
Official R website and citation format from https://www.r-project.org/
R 4.3.0 released April 21, 2023 per official announcement at stat.ethz.ch/pipermail/r-announce/2023/000691.html

privileged_info_summary: The R programming language is officially titled 'R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing' and is created and maintained by the R Core Team through the R Foundation for Statistical Computing. Version 4.3.0 was released on April 21, 2023. The R Foundation is located in Vienna, Austria (specifically at Wirtschaftsuniversität Wien). The official website is https://www.R-project.org/.
